title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates five best practices for deploying AI agents to production: streaming tool call events for responsive UIs, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost controls via lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability via metrics and distributed tracing. The patterns apply broadly across deployment contexts.
